name: Apple Pie #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 374°F (190°C).
2. Brush the bottom and sides of the crust evenly with the egg yolk.
3. Bake the crust on a baking sheet until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
4. Remove the crust from the oven.
5. In a large bowl, combine sliced apples, lemon juice, 1/2 cup sugar, 1/4 cup packed light brown sugar, 3 tablespoons flour, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Mix well and spoon into the crust.
6. In another bowl, mix the remaining flour, sugar, packed light brown sugar, and butter until crumbly.
7. Sprinkle the topping mixture evenly over the apples.
8. Bake on a baking sheet for about 50 minutes.
9. Cool on a wire rack. Serve at room temperature.
